nasb.text: From the half-tribe of Manasseh, they allotted Taanach with its pasture lands and Gath-rimmon with its pasture lands; two cities.

esv.text: and out of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Taanach with its pasturelands, and Gath-rimmon with its pasturelands—two cities.

cnv.text: 又從瑪拿西半個支派中，給了他們他納和他納的郊野，迦特．臨門和迦特．臨門的郊野，共兩座城。

ccb.text: 他们从玛拿西半个支派的产业中分到他纳和迦特·临门两座城及其草场。
